subcodes.first_line: O Thou the Almighty! Be thou a Helper and Patron of these real friends and suffer them to be established upon the throne of thy Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار دوستان حقیقی را یار و یاور باش و بر سریر ملکوت مستقر فرما
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
